name: New England Indoor Golf
about: New England Indoor Golf is an indoor golf simulator business offering course play, instruction, swing analysis, and club fitting to the public. The facility provides year-round golf in the New England region with automatic ball feeders and adjustable lies. Simulators are available for hourly rental with various pricing tiers and packages, with 18 holes averaging one hour per person.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium XGolf simulators with XPlate terrain simulation for realistic lie conditions
Dual video recording for swing analysis with slow-motion and step-motion playback
Flexible pricing including early bird and late bird specials for value seekers

food_and_drink.notes: Available but not specified what type

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Not specified - likely you can bring your own or use rentals

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: No, food and drink are available for purchase on site

faq.question: How long does 18 holes take?
faq.answer: An average of 1 hour per person

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly as indicated in their tags and general offerings
